name: gurney-memgraph
description: Long-term memory backed by FalkorDB + Graphiti via an HTTP bridge. Recall past facts, store new ones, and quietly extract memories from conversation history in the background.

telegram_commands.description: Wipe long-term memory for this chat

intent_pattern: \b(remember|recall|memory|forget|do you know|what do you know|what.*remember|i told you|i mentioned)\b
